ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sandra Gomes appeared by zoom in propria persona.

Mrs. Gomes apologized for not appearing at the June 6th hearing stating that it did not get on her calendar. The court does not find good cause. the court order sanctions in the amount of $250.00 against Mrs. Gomes payable within 10-days of the order. The order to show cause is off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Pliego. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Continued To Jul-11-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Sandra Gomes (executor) to appear on July 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear pursuant to CCP 128. Status on close of estate is continued to July 11, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Brown. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-28-2023 Continued To Jun-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-07-2023 Continued To Mar-28-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Oct-07-2019 is admitted to probate. Sandra Gomes is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Feb-07-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ronald Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Mahoney. Not reported.
